title: README.md: command to install on openSUSE
body:
Adds a simple documentation how to install skopeo on an openSUSE
distribution

Signed-off-by: José Guilherme Vanz <jguilhermevanz@suse.com>

comments.body: @jvanz, could you rebase ontop of master and squash the commits into one? Then we can merge. Some other things flew in over the weekend.
I messed up with the branch. I'll redo the PR

> @jvanz, could you rebase ontop of master and squash the commits into one? Then we can merge. Some other things flew in over the weekend.

Done. I've applied the patch on top of the latest commit from the master branch
Thanks, LGTM! We can merge once CI is green.
